visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic-heavy intro inside a Costco warehouse. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and red/yellow text are overlaid on a background showing blurry aisles and shoppers. A cartoon face of Wreck-It Ralph appears on the left side of the logo. (2) The scene cuts rapidly through a series of product shots on warehouse shelves. First, stacks of 'Mayflower' brand toilet paper are shown under bright industrial lighting; the packaging is pink and white. (3) A cut reveals boxes of 'I-Mei' chocolate crunch bars, stacked neatly with price overlays. (4) The camera shifts to the refrigerated section, showing trays of 'Iberico' pork slices wrapped in plastic with white labels. (5) Another tray of frozen pork belly for hot pot is shown, featuring thinly rolled pink meat. (6) Large green bags of 'Wonderful' brand pistachios are displayed on metal shelves. (7) Multiple boxes of Kinder Bueno chocolate bars are shown in a red and white cardboard display. (8) Red boxes of Pocky chocolate sticks are stacked high. (9) Purple and gold bags of Hershey's chocolates are visible in their display box. (10) Boxes of oatmeal cookies from 'Granola House' are shown. (11) Stacks of Kirkland signature microwave popcorn boxes are presented. (12) Yellow boxes of salted egg yolk cookies are displayed. (13) Red boxes of spicy chips are shown. (14) Arnotts crispy bites in yellow packaging are seen. (15) Blue and white boxes of 'Happy Swing' chocolate rolls are stacked. (16) Green bags of Korean seaweed snacks are shown. (17) Red and green boxes of Starbucks coffee capsules are displayed. (18) Viva brand mixed nuts are shown in bulk packaging. (19) Doritos variety packs in a large cardboard box are seen. (20) Cadina potato sticks are displayed. (21) Kenji party cakes in red packaging are shown. (22) Packaged braised chicken drumsticks are visible. (23) Large boxes of Pampers diapers are stacked in the aisle. (24) Sliced ham packages are shown. (25) Brown boxes of Swiss Miss hot cocoa mix are seen. (26) Cans of Klim milk powder are displayed. (27) Green packages of Kenji matcha latte powder are shown. (28) Tree Top tomato juice packs are visible. (29) Boxes of almond milk are shown. (30) Heinz lobster bisque cans are displayed in boxes. (31) Colorful boxes of white coffee are seen. (32) UCC coffee ball bags are shown. (33) Frozen popcorn chicken bags are displayed. (34) Frozen beef roll boxes are seen. (35) Boxes of steamed eggs are shown. (36) Glass jars of UCC charcoal coffee are displayed. (37) Green Giant corn cans are stacked. (38) Thai noodle boxes are seen. (39) Nongshim seaweed cup noodles are shown. (40) Jars of chili sauce are displayed. (41) Meiji nutritional powder boxes are seen. (42) Blue bottles of Herbal Essences shampoo are shown. (43) Yogurt packs with grains are visible. (44) A large beer advent calendar box is shown. (45) The video ends on a close-up of a red wine bottle labeled 'Evodia' sitting in a shopping cart with price overlays.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple shoppers are visible as blurry figures in the background aisles of the Costco warehouse throughout the video.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of high metal shelving units, warehouse lighting, and typical industrial-style ceilings of a Costco wholesale store. Various pallets and consumer goods are visible in the soft-focus distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, upbeat electronic pop track characterized by a fast BPM and synthetic percussion. A male narrator introduces the segment with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) As the visuals transition to the first product, the narrator delivers a rapid-fire description of 'Mayflower' toilet paper with clear articulation and high vocal arousal. (3) The pattern continues with the narrator speaking continuously over the driving BGM, listing each product and its corresponding discount price in a rhythmic fashion that mirrors the fast visual cuts. (4) Subtle digital pop SFX are audible during major category transitions, though the primary soundscape remains a high-density overlap of energetic narration and background music. (5) The narrator maintains a consistent professional yet excited promotional tone through the end of the video, concluding the product list with the final wine deal.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Sequential Product Discount Showcase -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform Costco members of the specific weekly discount items and their reduced prices for the period of December 22nd to December 28th, 2025, in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the Costco Wholesale logo, displays specific store-wide discounts with price tags, and uses a promotional narrator to showcase branded goods found within the warehouse.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses an extremely high editing pace and rapid-fire narration to fit a large amount of product information into a short format, typical of social media marketing for retail discounts.
